title: aster clivorum
intro: Aster clivorum, also known as the Chinese Asters, is a type of flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and reducing fever. The health benefits of Aster clivorum include its ability to reduce pain and swelling, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
